Class OGL15Graphics.OGL15GeometryBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.util.GeometryBuilder.Abstract<OGL15Graphics>
com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl1.OGL15Graphics.OGL15GeometryBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
GeometryBuilder
Enclosing class:
OGL15Graphics
public static class OGL15Graphics.OGL15GeometryBuilder extends GeometryBuilder.Abstract<OGL15Graphics>
Geometry builder used for OpenGL 1.5.

Matthew Tropiano
